name: NestJS + Postgres + Angular

api.dto.create.description: class-validator create DTO; Phase 22.E renders fields from blueprint entity (D-A-15)

api.dto.update.description: class-validator update DTO (PartialType of create DTO)

api.entity.description: Plain-TS entity; Phase 22.E renders fields from blueprint, no ORM annotations (D-A-15)

api.guard.policy.description: Template-shaped RBAC/ABAC policy guard (CanActivate); Phase 22.E (D-A-15) — emitted by the scaffolder, not pre-22.E

api.decorator.policy.description: @Resource() + @Action() route decorators; Phase 22.E companion to api.guard.policy (D-A-15)

ci.workflow.description: GitHub Actions per-module workflow (derived from CODEX CI_POLICY.md)

SKILL-write-overview.name: redox-pack-nestjs-postgres-angular.overview
SKILL-write-overview.body: NestJS (backend) + Angular (frontend) + Postgres. Typical monorepo split: apps/api/ (NestJS) + apps/web/ (Angular CLI workspace). Cite TypeScript everywhere; mention TypeORM/Prisma only if visible in inputs; note Angular Router as the SPA navigation layer.

SKILL-write-api-map.name: redox-pack-nestjs-postgres-angular.api-map
SKILL-write-api-map.body: Endpoints from @Controller-decorated classes. Group by controller class. Surface auth guards prominently (JwtAuthGuard / AuthGuard / RolesGuard). The global /api prefix is set in main.ts; tests build the app without bootstrap so e2e hit bare routes. DTOs are validated via class-validator with ValidationPipe({whitelist:true,forbidNonWhitelisted:true,transform:true}). Standard responses: lists return {data,meta}; POST/PATCH return {id}; UUID params use ParseUUIDPipe({version:'4'}).

SKILL-write-frontend-routes-map.name: redox-pack-nestjs-postgres-angular.frontend-routes-map
SKILL-write-frontend-routes-map.body: Angular routes live in app-routing.module.ts (and any feature-module routing files). Each route record has path + component + optional guards + optional resolvers. Surface canActivate guards (AuthGuard, RoleGuard with data.roles) and resolvers prominently. Note lazy-loaded modules (loadChildren) separately. AuthInterceptor (core) adds Authorization + X-User-Roles + Accept-Language headers to /api requests.

SKILL-write-database-reference.name: redox-pack-nestjs-postgres-angular.database-reference
SKILL-write-database-reference.body: Postgres dialect. Cite migration filenames as evidence (TypeORM migrations under apps/api/migrations/ or db/migrations/). Mark UUID PKs with gen_random_uuid() defaults specifically. Note @Entity decorator → table-name mappings if visible. Execution order is DDL → RLS → Audit → Seeds (configurable in package.json#dbase.order). Per-domain schemas: auth | audit | cms | flow | geo | <domain>. RLS context is propagated by services via set_config('auth.app_user_id', 'auth.roles', 'auth.lang') on each transaction.

SKILL-write-architecture-guide.name: redox-pack-nestjs-postgres-angular.architecture-guide
SKILL-write-architecture-guide.body: Backend TS path aliases: @core, @cms, @flow, @geo, @common/*. Domain modules depend on PORTS (interfaces injected via DI tokens), never concrete services — WorkflowRuntime, GeometryGateway, DocumentSetGateway are the canonical examples. Database orchestration lives in tools/dbase.config.json. Frontend feature folders mirror backend domains; path aliases @core/* @cms/* @flow/* @shared/* used throughout.

SKILL-write-rbac-matrix.name: redox-pack-nestjs-postgres-angular.rbac-matrix
SKILL-write-rbac-matrix.body: Roles from JWT cognito:groups claim. AuthN: JwtAuthGuard (JOSE + Cognito JWKs). AuthZ coordination: AuthzGuard with test-header overrides for e2e. Roles propagate into DB via RLS (set_config('auth.roles', ...)).

SKILL-write-threat-model.name: redox-pack-nestjs-postgres-angular.threat-model
SKILL-write-threat-model.body: OWASP A01-A10 NestJS+Cognito posture: A01 access control via RBAC guards + ABAC policy in services + deny-by-default routers; A02 crypto via TLS + KMS-managed keys; A03 injection via parameterized SQL only (no string-interpolation in raw queries); A05 misconfig via strict CORS + CSP (Angular) + disabled x-powered-by; A07 auth via Cognito JWT verification (iss + aud + short-lifetime); A08 supply-chain via lockfiles + npm audit; A09 logging with PII redaction; A10 SSRF via outbound HTTP allowlist + metadata-service protection.

SKILL-write-onboarding.name: redox-pack-nestjs-postgres-angular.onboarding
SKILL-write-onboarding.body: Per-module CI workflow (.github/workflows/module-<slug>.yml) runs: pnpm install + build + test + lint. Security gates: npm audit --audit-level=high (block on high/critical); secrets scan via GitHub Secret Scanning + regex grep. Branch protections: ≥1 code-owner approval for /core; module-owner approval for /domain/<module>. Test gates: unit ≥80% line+branch coverage.

notes: Phase 17.G shipped detection signals + extractor params + initial prompt overlays. Phase 18.G adds the codex-absorbed `templates` registry (consumed by SKILL-scaffold-*) and extends prompt_overlays with the P3.9 NestJS slice (architecture-guide / rbac-matrix / threat-model / onboarding overlays sourced from codex EXTRACTED_CONVENTIONS.md + SECURITY_BASELINES.md). Per D-59 18.G. Phase 19.B widens `detect.signals` with workspace-layout markers (turbo.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml, packages-web) so adopters whose deps live in subpackages (e.g. stynx) match by directory shape even without root-level @nestjs/@angular deps, and adds inventory_api.scan_dir for the codex-canonical apps/api/src layout. Per D-61 19.B. Phase 20.E widens detect.signals with reference-app markers (apps/reference-{api,web}/src + reference/{api,web}/src) and introduces `extractor_params.<sensor>.scan_dir_alternates` so the api + routes walkers walk parallel app layouts and merge results — closes the stynx-pilot overhead where adopters with reference/* layouts needed manual --scan-dir overrides for every sense run. inventory_data_model.migration_dirs widens accordingly. Per D-63 20.E.
